title: onagra parviflora
intro: Onagra parviflora, also known as Small-flowered Evening Primrose, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Onagraceae. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. Herbal preparations of Onagra parviflora include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
